package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for pgx_collectrows_unbounded_materialization: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: pgx.CollectRows used on request paths without a visible LIMIT in the query.
type CasePgxCollectrowsUnboundedMaterializationDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CasePgxCollectrowsUnboundedMaterializationModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CasePgxCollectrowsUnboundedMaterializationRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CasePgxCollectrowsUnboundedMaterializationModel
}

type CasePgxCollectrowsUnboundedMaterializationService struct {
    repo *CasePgxCollectrowsUnboundedMaterializationRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CasePgxCollectrowsUnboundedMaterializationAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositivePgxCollectrowsUnboundedMaterialization(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CasePgxCollectrowsUnboundedMaterializationDTO) error {
    focus := "pgx_collectrows_unbounded_materialization"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    db.Find(&[]CasePgxCollectrowsUnboundedMaterializationModel{})
    pool, _ := pgxpool.New(ctx, c.Query("dsn"))
    pool.Ping(ctx)
    pgx_collectrows_unbounded_materialization_positive := map[string]int{"pgx": 1, "collectrows": 2, "unbounded": 3, "materialization": 4}
    pgx_collectrows_unbounded_materialization_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    pgx_positive_0 := pgx_collectrows_unbounded_materialization_positive["pgx"] + len(input)
    _ = pgx_positive_0
    collectrows_positive_1 := pgx_collectrows_unbounded_materialization_positive["collectrows"] + len(input)
    _ = collectrows_positive_1
    unbounded_positive_2 := pgx_collectrows_unbounded_materialization_positive["unbounded"] + len(input)
    _ = unbounded_positive_2
    materialization_positive_3 := pgx_collectrows_unbounded_materialization_positive["materialization"] + len(input)
    _ = materialization_positive_3
    return nil
}
